command:
import json, subprocess, sys
producer = ['uv', 'run', '--project', '/home/graham/workspace/experiments/tau', 'tau', 'dag-run', '/home/graham/workspace/experiments/tau/experiments/goal-locked-subagents/proofs/real-world-sanity/20260705T221919Z-tau-all-level-with-branch-locks-20260705/medium-generic-dag-stale-work-order/dag-spec.json']
status_prefix = ['uv', 'run', '--project', '/home/graham/workspace/experiments/tau', 'tau', 'run-status']
run_dir_key = 'run_dir'
producer_expected = (1,)
first = subprocess.run(producer, text=True, capture_output=True)
sys.stderr.write(first.stderr)
if first.returncode not in producer_expected:
    sys.stdout.write(first.stdout)
    raise SystemExit(first.returncode)
payload = json.loads(first.stdout)
run_dir = payload[run_dir_key]
second = subprocess.run([*status_prefix, run_dir], text=True, capture_output=True)
sys.stderr.write(second.stderr)
sys.stdout.write(second.stdout)
raise SystemExit(second.returncode)
purpose: Tau summarizes a stale work-order blocked generic DAG through the read-only run-status surface without requiring provider artifacts.
